requirement_topic.en: IEC 61851 Safety Baseline — MSB / Project Evidence
requirement_topic.zh: IEC 61851安全基线——MSB / 项目证据
requirement_topic.zht: IEC 61851安全基線——MSB / 項目證據

summary.en: Mauritius Standards Bureau (MSB) is the national standards body and Mauritius commonly references IEC and British/IEC legacy standards for electrical equipment. EVSE safety evidence for Mauritius projects should therefore be prepared against IEC 61851-1 for conductive charging general requirements and IEC 61851-23 for DC EV supply equipment, with protection, isolation, control pilot, interlock, over-temperature, emergency-stop where applicable, enclosure ingress protection, and installation instructions suitable for humid coastal conditions.
summary.zh: 毛里求斯标准局（MSB）是国家标准机构，毛里求斯电气设备通常参考IEC及英国/IEC传统标准。因此，毛里求斯项目的EVSE安全证据应按IEC 61851-1传导充电通用要求和IEC 61851-23直流电动汽车供电设备准备，并涵盖保护、绝缘、控制导引、互锁、过温、适用时的急停、外壳防护等级，以及适合潮湿沿海环境的安装说明。
summary.zht: 模里西斯標準局（MSB）是國家標準機構，模里西斯電氣設備通常參考IEC及英國/IEC傳統標準。因此，模里西斯項目的EVSE安全證據應按IEC 61851-1傳導充電通用要求和IEC 61851-23直流電動汽車供電設備準備，並涵蓋保護、絕緣、控制導引、互鎖、過溫、適用時的急停、外殼防護等級，以及適合潮濕沿海環境的安裝說明。

standards_or_laws: Mauritius Standards Bureau (MSB) standards and conformity functions
IEC 61851-1 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — General requirements
IEC 61851-23 — DC electric vehicle supply equipment
IEC 60529 — Degrees of protection provided by enclosures (IP Code)

summary.en: China's comparable baseline is GB/T 18487.1-2023, supported by GB/T 20234 connector standards and GB/T 27930-2023 DC communication. Those documents are useful for design review but remain China-specific in connector, signalling, and communication assumptions. They do not by themselves establish IEC 61851 conformity for Mauritius MSB, CEB, importer, or project-owner review.
summary.zh: 中国可比基线为GB/T 18487.1-2023，并由GB/T 20234接口标准和GB/T 27930-2023直流通信支撑。这些文件可用于设计审查，但在接口、信号和通信假设上仍具中国特性。其本身不能证明符合毛里求斯MSB、CEB、进口商或项目业主审查所需的IEC 61851。
summary.zht: 中國可比基線為GB/T 18487.1-2023，並由GB/T 20234接口標準和GB/T 27930-2023直流通訊支撐。這些文件可用於設計審查，但在接口、信號和通訊假設上仍具中國特性。其本身不能證明符合模里西斯MSB、CEB、進口商或項目業主審查所需的IEC 61851。

gap.en: Prepare an IEC 61851-1 clause matrix, IEC 61851-23 evidence for DC products, accredited safety test reports, enclosure IP and corrosion evidence, protective device ratings, and instructions for coastal installation and maintenance. Include salt-mist, humidity, UV, drainage, anchoring, and cyclone wind-load assumptions where outdoor chargers are installed near the coast.
gap.zh: 应准备IEC 61851-1逐条矩阵、直流产品IEC 61851-23证据、认可安全测试报告、外壳IP及耐腐蚀证据、保护器件额定值，以及沿海安装和维护说明。室外充电桩安装在沿海区域时，应包括盐雾、湿度、紫外线、排水、锚固和台风风载假设。
gap.zht: 應準備IEC 61851-1逐條矩陣、直流產品IEC 61851-23證據、認可安全測試報告、外殼IP及耐腐蝕證據、保護器件額定值，以及沿海安裝和維護說明。室外充電樁安裝在沿海區域時，應包括鹽霧、濕度、紫外線、排水、錨固和颱風風載假設。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 61851 or MSB/CEB/project specifications require IEC-family safety evidence; coastal environmental derating is a practical project-acceptance gate
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 applies to China domestic design and is not accepted as direct IEC 61851 evidence without clause-level assessment and additional testing

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat GB/T 18487.1-2023 as a China design baseline only. Mauritius-facing files should include IEC 61851 safety evidence, DC-station IEC 61851-23 support, enclosure and corrosion testing, and coastal installation assumptions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应仅将GB/T 18487.1-2023视为中国设计基线。面向毛里求斯的文件应包括IEC 61851安全证据、直流站IEC 61851-23支持、外壳及耐腐蚀测试，以及沿海安装假设。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應僅將GB/T 18487.1-2023視為中國設計基線。面向模里西斯的文件應包括IEC 61851安全證據、直流站IEC 61851-23支持、外殼及耐腐蝕測試，以及沿海安裝假設。
